description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a blue hip roof and light-colored exterior walls. The front facade features a central entrance with a small overhang, flanked by two bushes and a window to the right. Large windows line the rear side, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property includes a landscaped yard with a circular stone-bordered planter containing a tree, and another mature tree near the front corner. Three display boards are positioned on one side of the lot, possibly for signage or information. The overall design is simple and modern, with clean lines and a functional layout.
description: A single-story bungalow with a blue hip roof, light walls, large rear windows, and landscaped yard with trees and a circular planter.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, a small overhang, bushes, and a tree near the corner.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular planter with a tree, display boards, and the side wall with a window.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, the circular planter, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Back view with large windows spanning the rear facade and a tree near the corner.
